# Wenbo Ji

> Personal research portfolio for Wenbo Ji, a visual computing researcher and M.Sc. student at the Technical University of Munich.

## Canonical Site

- Home: https://fusheng-ji.github.io/
- CV: https://fusheng-ji.github.io/assets/doc/WenboJi_CV_English.pdf
- Blog: https://fusheng-ji.github.io/blog/
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ZTUMczEAAAAJ&hl=en
- GitHub: https://github.com/fusheng-ji/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/wenbo-ji-6950b9187

## Identity

Wenbo Ji works on visual computing, 3D/4D reconstruction, long-term tracking, scene decomposition, video generation, avatar animation, human-scene interaction, and video world models for robot dexterous manipulation.

He is pursuing a second M.Sc. in Electrical Engineering and Information Technology at the Technical University of Munich. He works with the TUM Visual Computing Group and is an intern at Agile Robots SE.

## Research Topics

- Visual computing
- 3D and 4D reconstruction
- Gaussian splatting
- Long-term video and tissue tracking
- Scene decomposition and 3D zero-shot instance segmentation
- Human motion video diffusion
- Avatar animation
- Human-scene interaction
- Robot dexterous manipulation and video world models

## Selected Publications

- CSG-Fusion: Consistent Sparse-View Gaussian Splatting via Matching-based Fusion. ICCV 2025 Workshop E2E3D. Best Paper Award. https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content/ICCV2025W/E2E3D/html/Xia_CSG-Fusion_Consistent_Sparse-View_Gaussian_Splatting_via_Matching-based_Fusion_ICCVW_2025_paper.html
- LiteTracker: Leveraging Temporal Causality for Accurate Low-latency Tissue Tracking. MICCAI 2025. https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09904
- RE0: Recognize Everything with 3D Zero-shot Instance Segmentation. ICRA 2025. https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/11127468/

## Selected Projects

- OpenUserStudyKit: reusable infrastructure for user study questionnaires and experiment workflows. https://fusheng-ji.github.io/OpenUserStudyKit/
- LiteAvatar - WASM Version: browser-only audio-driven 2D avatar animation using WebAssembly. https://fusheng-ji.github.io/lite-avatar-WASM/
- Tour into the Picture: single-image scene reconstruction and animation course project. https://fusheng-ji.github.io/projects/tum_cv_challenge_ss24/
- Thermal Receipt Physics Demo: Three.js and WebGL receipt cloth simulation. https://fusheng-ji.github.io/three_js_arts/jelly_receipt/
- Duck Pool: Three.js water simulation with CPU height-field waves, caustics, and floating ducks. https://fusheng-ji.github.io/three_js_arts/water_pool/
